filament_geometry: R/Z filament lists and mean width/height (dR/dZ) from pf_active.zarr arrays (sol_*, p2_inner_*, p2_outer_*, p3_*, p4_*, p5_*, p6_*).

limiter.provenance: Computational limiter from FAIR-MAST flux-loop geometry channels (magnetics.zarr flux_loop_r/z), not a surveyed vessel CAD.

note: Replaces FreeGSNKE public MAST-U-like structural pickles for FAIR-MAST classic MAST shots. Archived prior pickles under archive_mastu_like/ when present.
passives: omitted (empty list); MAST-U passives not copied
resistivity_citation: FreeGSNKE default copper resistivity used in public machine_configs (value 1.55e-08); material constant — not invented coil geometry.
source: FAIR-MAST Level-2 Zarr (classic MAST — not MAST-U)
